item.title: ローリー・アンダーソンが 京都賞を受賞されたそうです おめでとうございます🍾 彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード 俺の太極…
item.author: 翻訳の吉田俊太郎 (@shuntaroyoshida.bsky.social)
item.description:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！
item.content:encoded:
ローリー・アンダーソンが
京都賞を受賞されたそうです
おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！

item.title: Venezuela does not have a national early warning system of i…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Venezuela does not have a national early warning system of its own, but people with Android phones received alerts from Google’s Earthquake Alerts system seconds before back-to-back quakes struck on Wednesday. trib.al/KI8ICSy
item.content:encoded: Venezuela does not have a national early warning system of its own, but people with Android phones received alerts from Google’s Earthquake Alerts system seconds before back-to-back quakes struck on Wednesday. trib.al/KI8ICSy

item.title: "They've done everything possible to eliminate us" — Iran ca…
item.author: Raider (@iwillnotbesilenced.bsky.social)

item.content:encoded: "They've done everything possible to eliminate us" — Iran captain Mehdi Taremi unleashes on FIFA and U.S. organizers

item.title: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que…
item.author: Serge Katz (@sk-serge.bsky.social)
item.description: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.
item.content:encoded: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.

item.title: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White H…
item.author: Barack Obama (@barackobama.bsky.social)
item.description: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.
item.content:encoded: I would read letters like Emily’s every night in the White House. They were powerful reminders of why the work we did mattered, and who we were fighting for.

item.title: Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began co…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:
item.content:encoded:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:

item.title: A judge in Alaska ordered late Friday that Dan J. Sullivan b…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A judge in Alaska ordered late Friday that Dan J. Sullivan be allowed to join the Republican Senator Dan S. Sullivan on the state’s primary ballot, reversing a state elections official’s finding that Dan J. Sullivan was ineligible.
item.content:encoded: A judge in Alaska ordered late Friday that Dan J. Sullivan be allowed to join the Republican Senator Dan S. Sullivan on the state’s primary ballot, reversing a state elections official’s finding that Dan J. Sullivan was ineligible.

item.title: Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, th…
item.author: Hemant Mehta (@friendlyatheist.com)
item.description:
Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, the Burning Bush, Adam & Eve, and more as required reading.

It's terrible news for religious freedom.

It's also terrible news for Christianity itself.

www.friendlyatheist.com/p/texas-just...
item.content:encoded:
Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, the Burning Bush, Adam & Eve, and more as required reading.

It's terrible news for religious freedom.

It's also terrible news for Christianity itself.

www.friendlyatheist.com/p/texas-just...

item.title: #BlueskyArtShow #Macro Silver Puff (Uropappus lindleyi (DC.…

item.description:
#BlueskyArtShow #Macro

Silver Puff (Uropappus lindleyi (DC.) Nutt.). A wildflower that is going to seed, much like a dandelion.

Silver Puff (Uropappus lindleyi (DC.) Nutt.). A wildflower that is going to seed, much like a dandelion.

item.title: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.
item.content:encoded: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.

item.title: And I'm headed for the middle of nowhere tomorrow. Time to r…
item.author: Lorraine Carey (@lalawriter71.bsky.social)
item.description: And I'm headed for the middle of nowhere tomorrow. Time to relax in the country for a week. I just may be tempted to bring my notebook.
item.content:encoded: And I'm headed for the middle of nowhere tomorrow. Time to relax in the country for a week. I just may be tempted to bring my notebook.

item.title: Tiesin toki, ettei Eeva Kilpi elä ikuisesti, mutta salaa ehk…
item.author: Kardemummo (@kardemummo.bsky.social)

item.title: These were my dad’s favorite birds. I lost him a couple yea…
item.author: Jim Musil Painter (@jimmusilpainter.bsky.social)
item.description:
These were my dad’s favorite birds.

I lost him a couple years ago and I’ve found it helpful to imagine that his spirit lives on in these birds. I see them often along the bike trails that I frequent and I always say a little hello as I pass. 

RED WINGED BLACKBIRD, Acrylic, 16x16” ©2026 Jim Musil
item.content:encoded:
These were my dad’s favorite birds.

I lost him a couple years ago and I’ve found it helpful to imagine that his spirit lives on in these birds. I see them often along the bike trails that I frequent and I always say a little hello as I pass. 

RED WINGED BLACKBIRD, Acrylic, 16x16” ©2026 Jim Musil

item.title: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've ever seen, and has only gotten squishier with age. 14/10 like fine wine #SeniorPupSaturday (IG: wrinkledogmace)
item.content:encoded: This is Mace. He has one of the squishiest sugar faces we've ever seen, and has only gotten squishier with age. 14/10 like fine wine #SeniorPupSaturday (IG: wrinkledogmace)

item.title: Color me beautiful ! A new n fabulous raspberry red hollyho…
item.author: fredarock2.bsky.social (@fredarock2.bsky.social)
item.description:
Color me beautiful !

A new n fabulous raspberry red hollyhock just started blooming I our garden. I don't have this color before & all the seeds we planted are collected from my garden. Took this pic on a cloudy Thursday.

#hollyhocks #alcearosea7
#raspberryred #perennial
#juneflowers
item.content:encoded:
Color me beautiful !

A new n fabulous raspberry red hollyhock just started blooming I our garden. I don't have this color before & all the seeds we planted are collected from my garden. Took this pic on a cloudy Thursday.

#hollyhocks #alcearosea7
#raspberryred #perennial
#juneflowers

item.title: “It’s a disaster World Cup” - Medhi Taremi, Iran captain. G…
item.author: Prashant 🌊 (@prasshant.bsky.social)
item.description:
“It’s a disaster World Cup” - Medhi Taremi, Iran captain.
Good for him to speak up, his body language says a lot more than his words. 😕
item.content:encoded:
“It’s a disaster World Cup” - Medhi Taremi, Iran captain.
Good for him to speak up, his body language says a lot more than his words. 😕

item.title: Quite a lot of people lost someone, maybe an elderly relativ…
item.author: Arthur Snell (@snellarthur.bsky.social)
item.description:
Quite a lot of people lost someone, maybe an elderly relative, during the heatwave. My Aunt Barbara, very ill with advanced dementia, died yesterday aged 91.

She was unmarried, no kids and I had been taking care of her affairs for the past few years. That’s the least interesting thing about her.

1
item.content:encoded:
Quite a lot of people lost someone, maybe an elderly relative, during the heatwave. My Aunt Barbara, very ill with advanced dementia, died yesterday aged 91.

She was unmarried, no kids and I had been taking care of her affairs for the past few years. That’s the least interesting thing about her.

1

item.title: The elders told of how this flower did not spring from seeds…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: The elders told of how this flower did not spring from seeds, but from the tears of the Goddess. Some called her Freya; others, Brigid or Persephone. The names changed with the lands, yet the story remained the same.
item.content:encoded: The elders told of how this flower did not spring from seeds, but from the tears of the Goddess. Some called her Freya; others, Brigid or Persephone. The names changed with the lands, yet the story remained the same.

item.title: “The only thing worse than being blind is having sight but n…
item.author: The Story of Writing (@sownow.bsky.social)
item.description:
“The only thing worse than being blind is having sight but no vision.”
-American advocate and writer Helen Keller, born on this day in 1880

A co-founder of the ACLU, she helped blind and deaf people get better treatment and leave asylums.

#WriterSky #BookSky #Activist #Advocate #History #BOTD
item.content:encoded:
“The only thing worse than being blind is having sight but no vision.”
-American advocate and writer Helen Keller, born on this day in 1880

A co-founder of the ACLU, she helped blind and deaf people get better treatment and leave asylums.

#WriterSky #BookSky #Activist #Advocate #History #BOTD

item.title: It takes a thousand years to regrow a West Coast old growth …
item.author: Ashley Zacharias (@ashleyzacharias.bsky.social)
item.description: It takes a thousand years to regrow a West Coast old growth forest. If our great-great-great-great-great grandchildren will never see it restored, it should be considered a non-renewable resource.
item.content:encoded: It takes a thousand years to regrow a West Coast old growth forest. If our great-great-great-great-great grandchildren will never see it restored, it should be considered a non-renewable resource.

item.title: Eeva Kilven kirjasta Kuolinsiivous. Olen kuullut tämän runon…
item.author: Tarja Viholainen (@tarjatuulikki.bsky.social)
item.description:
Eeva Kilven kirjasta Kuolinsiivous.
Olen kuullut tämän runon hänen itsensä esittämänä, eikä se unohdu koskaan. 💔
item.content:encoded:
Eeva Kilven kirjasta Kuolinsiivous.
Olen kuullut tämän runon hänen itsensä esittämänä, eikä se unohdu koskaan. 💔
